description: Official TypeScript SDK for the Caesar search API: web search with provenance for agents
rules: Instantiate new Caesar(); CAESAR_API_KEY is read from the environment
Methods are search(), read(), feedback(); the search size option is maxResults
Continue truncated reads with startChar instead of increasing maxChars
Catch AuthenticationError, RateLimitError, APIStatusError from caesar-search
Response fields are snake_case, matching the API
Vercel AI SDK tools are exported from caesar-search/ai via caesarTools()
